task-registry.task: Vite + TS + Kaplay config, index.html, main entry
Core data models: GameState, Entity, Item, Spell, Rune, Room, Floor
Event bus for event-driven rendering (R-v5.21)
Title screen scene with New Game / Continue buttons
Author Floor 1 data (8 rooms: entrance, combat, forge, training, rest, combat2, elite, boss)
Author Floor 2 data (9 rooms: entrance, combat, merchant, event, forge, combat2, rest, elite, boss)
Visual map renderer with room icons, SVG connections, player position
Click-to-navigate + room transition scenes
HUD: HP bar, mana bar, stamina bar, XP bar, floor indicator, gold, game clock
Combat scene with player vs enemy visual layout (R-v5.18)
Auto-resolve engine: action policies, loadout-based resolution (R-v5.13)
Combat log with real-time action display
Pause combat to adjust loadout/policies
Trait system: numeric traits on all entities, shift from combat (R-v5.14)
Combat rewards: XP, gold, loot drops, affinity gains
Rune data + discovery system (starter runes + floor drops) (R-v5.02)
Forge UI: select ingredients, craft spell, procedural naming (R-v5.19)
Spells-as-ingredients + unique ingredient constraint (R-v5.19, R-v5.20)
Affinity tracking by casting, threshold rewards (R-v5.01, R-v5.16)
Integrate crafted spells into combat loadout
Inventory grid UI with item categories (R-v5.05)
Equipment slots: main-hand, off-hand, body, trinket (R-v5.05)
Character sheet panel with stats, traits, affinities (R-v5.06)
Physical skill tree (separate from spells) (R-v5.06)
Loadout management: spell slots + skill slots (R-v5.07)
NPC dialogue system with branching + trait reactivity (R-v5.04, R-v5.14)
Author 3 NPCs: Old Sage Miren, Kira the Shadow, Galen the Freed
Merchant UI: buy/sell/trade (R-v5.03)
Event room interactions
Rest room action (heal + loadout change) (R-v5.11)
Floor bosses: The Warden (F1), The Lich Archon (F2)
Encounters requiring crafted spells (Crystal Golem, Mirror Knight)
Resource pressure: limited mana, limited healing at rest rooms
Enemy counterplay: resistances, immunities, reflect mechanics
Game clock (real-time, day/night display)
localStorage save/load with checkpoints (R-v5.09)
Transient UI feedback toasts, auto-dismiss (R-v5.10)
Icon/sprite pass with @iconify-json/game-icons
Visual polish: CSS variables, themed rooms, gradients, styled buttons
Production build (npx vite build --base ./)
